characters.name: Allen Anderson
characters.description: OriginalAnimatedAllen AndersonBiographical informationFull nameAllen AndersonAlternative nameAlGenderMalePersonal informationFamilyAndy Anderson(father)Annie Anderson(mother)AlliesPunky BrewsterCherie JohnsonMargaux KramerBrandon(dog)Henry WarnimontGlomer(It's Punky Brewsteronly)Mike Fulton(teacher)Series informationFirst appearance"Walk Pool / Gone Fishing"Last  appearance"The Treehouse That Punky Built"(flashback)Portrayed byCasey EillsonAllen Andersonis a friend ofPunky,Cherie Johnson, andMargaux Kramer. He was portrayed byCasey Ellisonwho also voiced him inIt's Punky Brewster. Allen has been the less smart member of Punky's group of friends his antics would get him and sometimes Punky & the others into trouble. However Allen has shown he is smart when it comes to mechanics as he helped with the elevator for Punky's tree house which is used to help Brandon into the tree house. Allen one day made fun of the school janitor named Linda which made her cry forcing Mike to make him do an assignment on the Special Olympics. He was also present after Cherie was found unconscious inside of Henry's old refrigerator. Henry told him to go call 911 which he does and gets Betty afterwards he was hard on himself for not learning CPR until Henry calms him down. He was also present in the classroom when the Space Shuttle Challenge blew up while watching the launch on tv. One day his parents Andy & Annie were arguing which caused him to go to Punky & Henry's apartment. He mentions about the talk of them getting divorced which happened. Punky finds him living in the treehouse and he tells her about him moving to Kanas with his mother. Then later he says goodbye to Punky & everyone saying he will keep in touch with them. Allen like his live action counterpart is friends with Punky and goes on adventures with her, Cherie, Margaux, Brandon, & Glomer.

characters.name: Betty Johnson
characters.description: Betty JohnsonBiographical informationFull nameBetty JohnsonAge70's (Deceased)Born1929DiedUnknownGenderFemalePersonal informationFamilyCherie Johnson(granddaughter)Larnese Barker(sister, deceased)Ronald George Johnson(son, deceased)Elizabeth Marie Johnson(daughter-in-law, deceased)Paula(niece)Bobby(nephew)AlliesBrandon(dog,original seriesdeceased)Henry WarnimontMargaux KramerAllen AndersonPunky BrewsterMike FultonOccupationNurseSeries informationFirst appearance"Punky Finds a Home, part 1"Last  appearance"Put A Ring On It(mentioned)"Portrayed bySusie GarrettBetty Johnsonwas a registered nurse and the grandmother ofCherie Johnson. she was portrayed in the original series by the lateSusie Garrett. Betty is tasked with raising Cherie after her parents: Betty's son Ronald and his wife Elizabeth were killed in a car accident in 1981 and is a nurse. Betty along with Cherie lives in the same apartment complex in whichHenry Warnimontlives at and manages, whenPunky Brewsterstarted to live there after Henry began to foster to her. She would not only give Cherie advice, but also advice to Punky acting like a mother to her in place ofSusanincluding when Punky began puberty with taking about getting her first bra.

characters.name: Blade
characters.description: Bladewas a recurring character who appeared in both parts of the cliffhanger episodeFenster Hall. He is a criminal who lives in the slum. When a boy named T.C. was abandoned, at some point in time Blade found him. Blade taught T.C. how to be a pickpocket, and at a later point when T.C. grew bigger as well as proficient at pickpocketing he promoted T.C. to climbling windows and burglarizing peoples' homes. Blade is a nasty man who is abusive to T.C. if he fails to provide enough loot and nice to T.C. if he brings a lot of stolen goods.

characters.name: Brandon
characters.description: OrignalAnimatedBrandonBiographical informationFull nameBrandon Chase BrewsterAge5 (Deceased)GenderMaleMarital statusMarriedPersonal informationFamilyPunky Brewster(owner)Henry Warnimont(master and provider, deceased)Susan Brewster(original master and provider)Brenda (wife, deceased)Lucky (daughter, deceased)Rocky (son, deceased)Ellie (daughter, deceased)Brandy (Great, Great, Grandson)RomancesBrenda (wife, deceased)AlliesCherie JohnsonAllen AndersonMargaux KramerGlomer(It's Punky Brewsteronly)Betty JohnsonJoey DeantonEnemiesTiffany BuckworthSeries informationFirst appearance"Punky Finds a Home, part 1"Last  appearance"The Treehouse That Punky Built(flashback)"Portrayed bySandy (original series)Frank Welker (It's Punky Brewster)Brandon Chase Brewsteris a golden retriever andPunky's lifelong buddy ever since he was a puppy. Not much is known about Brandon's past he was with Punky & her mother Susan before both were abandoned by her due to alcoholism. Brandon  & Punky were abandoned by Susan in the supermarket parking lot one day he would accompany her to the apartment complex whereHenry Warnimontlived at & managed until one day they were both caught by him.

characters.name: Cherie Johnson
characters.description: RevivalOriginalAnimatedCherie JohnsonBiographical informationFull nameCherie JohnsonPersonal informationFamilyBetty Johnson(grandmother, deceased)Larnese Barker(aunt, deceased)Ronald George Johnson(father, deceased)Elizabeth Marie Johnson(mother, deceased)Paula(cousin)Bobby(cousin)RomancesLauren(fiancée)AlliesBrandon(dog,original seriesdeceased)Henry Warnimont(deceased)Punky Brewster(best friend)HannahDanielDiegoIzzyTravis KeatonMargaux KramerAllen AndersonMike Fulton(teacher)Glomer(It's Punky Brewsteronly)Brandy(dog,reboot series)OccupationSocial worker working with orphaned children at Fenster HallAffiliationFenster HallSeries informationFirst appearance"Punky Finds a Home, part 1"Portrayed byCherie JohnsonCherie JohnsonisPunky's best friend, who lives on the third floor of the apartment building with her grandmother. She is very sarcastic, jokes around a lot, and loves to eat. Not much is known about Cherie's past her parents Elizabeth & Ronald were both killed in a car crash in 1981 which forces her to live with her grandmotherBetty Johnson. Cherie at first helped with hiding Punky & Brandon from her grandmother &Henry Warnimontuntil eventually they see each other a lot. One day while playing hide & seek she hides in Henry's old refrigerator where she becomes trapped and loses consciousness until both Punky & Margaux remember what Mike taught them in CPR then they revive her & save her life.

characters.name: Glomer
characters.description: AnimatedGlomerBiographical informationGenderMalePersonal informationAlliesPunky BrewsterCherie JohnsonMargaux KramerAllen AndersonBrandonSeries informationFirst appearance"Punky To The Rescue / The Quartersize Quarterback"Last  appearance"Caught In The Act"Portrayed byFrank welkerGlomeris a magical sprite who came from Chaundoon, a city at the end of the rainbow. He possesses various magical powers, among which the ability to instantly transportPunky Brewster,Cherie Johnson,Margaux Kramer,Allen Anderson, and sometimesBrandonas well, to anywhere they want to go. Glomer sometimes plays around which his magic, which leads to mistakes that he needs to correct, such as when he accidentally transformedHenry Warnimontinto a statue of Julius Caesar.

characters.name: Henry Warnimont
characters.description: OriginalAnimatedHenry WarnimontBiographical informationFull nameHenry P. WarnimontAge90’s (Deceased)Born1924DiedUnknownGenderMaleMarital statusWidowerPersonal informationFamilyPunky Brewster(adoptive daughter)Louise(niece)Travis Keaton(son in law)Hannah(granddaughter)Daniel(grandson)Diego(grandson)Izzy(granddaughter)RomancesClaudia Warnimont(1st wife; deceased)Maggie McLerie(ex girlfriend)Susan Brewster(2nd wife)AlliesCherie JohnsonMargaux KramerAllen AndersonBrandon(dog, deceased)EddieBetty JohnsonMike FultonMike DeantonEnemiesSam "Matt" GlossyBenjamin J. KramerOccupationPhotographer(formerly)Owner of Punky's Place(formerly)building manager(formerly)AffiliationWarnimont Studios(formerly)Punky's Place(formerly)Series informationFirst appearance"Punky Finds a Home, part 1"Last  appearance"The Treehouse That Punky Built"(flashback)Portrayed byGeorge GaynesHenry Warnimontwas the building manager of the apartment building wherePunkyfound a new home in an apartment on the second floor after being abandoned by her mother in a car. He was portrayed in the original live action series and voiced in the cartoon series by the lateGeorge Gaynes. Not much was known about Henry's childhood or early life, although it is likely his interest in photography started at a young age. As a teenager he dated a girl named  Maggie McLerie. He had a date with her in 1941 where he intended to propose to her at a restaurant named Luigi's. However, that date was spoiled by people reacting to the attack on Pearl Harbor. Henry elected to put his social life on hold and enlist in the U.S. Navy to support the war effort. However, in doing so he lost contact with Maggie. When his military career was over, he resumed his interest in photography, soon becoming a professional photographer. He also resumed his love life, marrying a woman namedClaudia.  The marriage was apparently a happy one, though they had no children. When Claudia died of an unknown ailment, Henry took it hard. His personality changed for the worse, becoming a grumpy man with a cold personality towards others. Henry, however, still retained some of his former personality by holding a candle for Claudia in keeping photographs of her in his residence. He had also ventured into a second trade, becoming the manager of the apartment building where he worked. In his duties as building manager, he discovered an abandoned child squatting in his building. Though angry at first, this would change his life for the better. Realizing she was all alone, Henry begrudgingly tookPunkyin and cared for her. He fights to foster Punky until he wins the case in court. One day his original studio burned down in a fire. The stress of the loss of his business caused Henry to be hospitalized for an ulcer. As Henry was both incapacitated and bereft of income, he was declared unfit to be a parent and Punky was sent to Fenster Hall. Henry recovered from the ulcer, then managed to resume his photography business. During this time, he legally f
characters.personality_section: Despite being a bit gruff at times, he is a good man, caring and sincere.

characters.description: IzzyBiographical informationFull nameIsabelle Lucky BrewsterAge8 years oldGenderFemalePersonal informationFamilyHenry Warnimont(foster grandfather, deceased)Susan Brewster(foster grandmother)Travis(foster father)Punky Brewster(foster mother)Daniel(foster brother)Diego(foster brother)Hannah(foster sister)AlliesBrandy(dog)Cherie JohnsonMargaux KramerSeries informationFirst appearance"Pilot"Portrayed byQuinn CopelandIsabelle "Izzy" Lucky Brewsteris a main character in thePunky Brewster revival series.She is portrayed byQuinn Copeland.  Not much is known about Izzy's past other than her father possibly passed away leaving her with the hat she has, & that her mother possibly was a drug addict or alcoholic going into a halfway house. Izzy would find herself at Fenster Hall one day escaping from there numerous times.

characters.name: Margaux Kramer
characters.description: RebootOriginalAnimatedMargaux KramerBiographical informationAlternative nameMargot(real name)GenderFemalePersonal informationFamilyBenjamin J. Kramer(father)Mrs. Kramer(mother)AlliesBrandon(dog,original seriesdeceased),Punky BrewsterBetty JohnsonCherie JohnsonAllen AndersonGlomer(It's Punky Brewsteronly)Henry Warnimont(deceased)Mike Fulton(teacher)IzzyOccupationPublic Relations Representative for the WWESeries informationFirst appearance"Walk Pool / Gone Fishing"Last  appearance"The Treehouse That Punky Built"(flashback)Portrayed byAmi FosterMargaux KramerisPunkyandCherie's rich and sometimes snobby friend. She eventually becomes less self-centered, much to the benefit of her friendship with Punky and Cherie. She's portrayed in the original & reboot series byAmi Fosterwho also voices her inIt's Punky Brewster. Margaux would meet Punky, Cherie, & Allen one day at school and become friends with each other. She would play a part helping with designing Punky's treehouse, her and Punky would end up saving Cherie's life after hiding in Henry's old refrigerator after learning CPR from Mike one day while playing hide & seek. Later Punky & Cherie would buy back her doll that was being auctioned off after her family lost their fortune and she later pay them back by treating them to a weekend of skiing. Years later her, Cherie, & Punky still stay in touch and one day helped her hookIzzywith a day of meeting stars from the WWE. She's is very nice to her friends though can be snobby sometimes.
characters.personality_section: She's is very nice to her friends though can be snobby sometimes.

characters.name: Mike Fulton
characters.description: Mike FultonPersonal informationFamilyLois Collins(mother)AlliesBrandon(dog)Punky BrewsterBetty JohnsonCherie JohnsonAllen AndersonHenry WarnimontMargaux KramerEnemiesBladeRitaSimon P. ChillingsOccupationCounselor at Fenster Hall(formerly)Grade School TeacherAffiliationFenster Hall(formerly)Series informationFirst appearanceFenster Hall, part 1Last  appearanceMother's Day(mentioned only)Portrayed byT. K. CarterMike Fulton was a character in thePunky Brewster (series)from 1985–1986. He was portrayed byT. K. Carter. Mike was placed in foster care at birth and was shuffled around homes before permanently staying at Fenster Hall, the orphanage, from the time he was seven. Mike, now grown, was involved in the administrative aspect of Fenster Hall. He served as the chief counselor to the boys as well as ensuring that Fenster Hall's budget was balanced. In a later series Mike started a career in education, by getting a job as a teacher at an elementary school, where he ended up teaching fourth grade studies to Allan, Margaux, and Punky. As an educator, Mike was devoted to his work, such as giving lessons about multipication can be easy to recall, or wearing a steel helmet like General Patton's when giving a lesson about the Second World War. He would always give Punky advice whenever she needed it, helping her build her treehouse, even teaching her, & Margaux CPR which would later help save Cherie's life, finding his mother with help from Punky, & Henry, and lastly help Henry adopt Punky while getting her out of Fenster Hall.

characters.name: Mike Fulton

K. CarterMike Fulton was a character in thePunky Brewster (series)from 1985–1986. He was portrayed byT. K. Carter. Mike was placed in foster care at birth and was shuffled around homes before permanently staying at Fenster Hall, the orphanage, from the time he was seven. Mike, now grown, was involved in the administrative aspect of Fenster Hall. He served as the chief counselor to the boys as well as ensuring that Fenster Hall's budget was balanced. In a later series Mike started a career in education, by getting a job as a teacher at an elementary school, where he ended up teaching fourth grade studies to Allan, Margaux, and Punky. As an educator, Mike was devoted to his work, such as giving lessons about multipication can be easy to recall, or wearing a steel helmet like General Patton's when giving a lesson about the Second World War. He would always give Punky advice whenever she needed it, helping her build her treehouse, even teaching her, & Margaux CPR which would later help save Cherie's life, finding his mother with help from Punky, & Henry, and lastly help Henry adopt Punky while getting her out of Fenster Hall.

characters.name: Punky Brewster
characters.description: RevivalOriginalAnimatedPunky BrewsterBiographical informationFull namePenelope BrewsterAlternative namePunkyAge8 years old(startoriginal series)GenderFemaleMarital statusDivorced(reboot)Personal informationFamilyHenry Warnimont(adoptive father, deceased)Louise(adoptive cousin)Susan Brewster(mother)Hannah(daughter)Daniel(adoptive son)Diego(adoptive son)Izzy(foster daughter)RomancesTravis Keaton(husband; divorced)AlliesBetty JohnsonBrandon(dogoriginal seriesdeceased)EddieCherie Johnson(best friend)Allen AndersonMargaux KramerMike FultonGlomer(It's Punky Brewsteronly)Farley "Spud" BlugnerJoey DeantonLaurenBrandy (dogPunky Brewster (reboot)EnemiesMelanie "Moose" McGurkSimon P. ChillingsTiffany BuckworthOccupationPhotographerSeries informationFirst appearance"Punky Finds a Home, part 1"Portrayed bySoleil Moon FryePenelope "Punky" Brewsteris a bright, spunky, bubbly girl who wears bright-colored, mismatched clothes and loves to help people. She is the main protagonist ofPunky Brewster (series),It's Punky Brewster, &Punky Brewster (reboot).  She's portrayed bySoleil Moon Fryein both the original & reboot series in live action, as well as voiced by her in the cartoon series. Punky was born toSusan Brewsterat some point, her father left her and her mother, & her mother turned to drinking. Punky would help take care of Susan whenever she was drunk. When she was eight years old, her mother left her in the car outside a shopping center, one day. Left alone with no one but her faithful golden retriever puppyBrandonby her side, Punky took to carrying people's grocery bags in exchange for money to be able to survive. At nights, she and Brandon stayed in the car, until relocating to an empty second-floor apartment to which they had access via a fire escape. At this point she would be friendCherie Johnsonwho would help prevent her from being caught by the building manager,Henry Warnimont.

characters.name: Susan Brewster
characters.description: RevivalOriginalSusan BrewsterBiographical informationAge60’sGenderFemalePersonal informationFamilyPunky Brewster(daughter)Brandon(dog, deceased)Travis Keaton(son in law)Hannah Brewster(granddaughter)Daniel Keaton(adoptive grandson)Diego Keaton(adoptive grandson)Izzy Brewster(foster granddaughter)Series informationFirst appearance"Punky Finds a Home, part 1"(mentioned only)"80s Block Party"(first physical appearance)Last  appearanceMother's DayPortrayed bySharon LawrenceSusan Brewsteris the mother ofPunky Brewster, & grandmother ofHannah,Daniel,Diego, andIzzy. Not much is known about Susan's past at some point she gives birth to Punky, her husband walks out on her & Punky. One day she turned to drinking in which Punky had to help take care of Susan whenever she was drunk. One day Susan left her daughter Punky and their dog,Brandon, in the car at a shopping center and never looked back. She and Punky were never reunited afterwards until years later. She would be mentioned throughout the series including her music box that Punky would eventually obtain through Santa Claus who gave it toHenry Warnimont.

characters.name: Travis Keaton
characters.description: Travis KeatonBiographical informationFull nameTravis KeatonGenderMaleMarital statusPunky Brewster(ex-wife)Personal informationFamilyPunky Brewster(ex-wife)Henry Warnimont(father in law, deceased)Susan Brewster(mother in law)Hannah(daughter)Daniel(adoptive son)Diego(adoptive son)Izzy(foster daughter)AlliesBrandy(dog)Cherie JohnsonOccupationMusicianSeries informationFirst appearance"Pilot"Portrayed byFreddie Prinze Jr.Travis Keatonis a main character in thePunky Brewster revival series.He is Punky's ex husband. His character is portrayed byFreddie Prinze Jr. One day Travis meetsPunkywho would take him to her apartment complex & treehouse, & introduce him toHenry Warnimont. At some point Travis would marry Punky, and fatherHannahwith him. He and her would later adoptDiego, &Daniel. Travis would often be on the road with his band which eventually lead to Punky divorcing him. Travis returns from the road one day to see Punky fosteringIzzywho at first doesn't get along with him then later they both bond overtime. He begins to re-enter Punky, Hannah, Diego, & Daniel's life helping them out. Travis would often give advice to Izzy, while making amends with Hannah, Diego, & Daniel trying to be a father. One day he and Punky kiss again show they still have feelings for each other deep down on the inside. He is also present for Izzy's hearing as he was on his way to join his band in Kansas realizing that being a father is more important than being a musician.
